goal: Inspect the workspace, run the test suite, fix any failing code if possible, and produce a final report.

steps.reason: Check the project structure and identify the source of any test failures.
Execute the tests to confirm failures and verify fixes.
Apply a minimal code fix if needed and summarize the outcome.
Report what was changed, test results, and any remaining issues.

done_when: Tests pass successfully or the failure cause is clearly identified and fixed.
A concise final report summarizes the inspection, fix, and test outcome.
